# Conclusion for the observed annual difference

if (annual_difference < ADR_lower) {
  cat("The annual difference indicates a potential understatement requiring investigation.\n")
} else if (annual_difference > ADR_upper) {
  cat("The annual difference indicates a potential overstatement requiring investigation.\n")
} else {
  cat("The annual difference falls within the acceptable difference range.\n")
}
\end{Verbatim}
